Configuration for a simple analog watch face with static image and time elements.

# Purpose
The JSON configuration file defines the layout and elements of a watch face for a Pebble smartwatch. It specifies the watch face's name as `gen_analog` with a visible name of "Simple Watch Face" and associates it with the company "Pebble." The file describes various elements, including a static background image and time-related text and hand elements. The `static-image` element named `background` is positioned at coordinates [0, 0] and uses an image defined by `SIMPLE_BG`. The `time-text` elements display the day name and day number, each with specific positions, sizes, fonts, and colors. The `hand` elements represent the minute and hour hands, each with a defined pivot point and associated image, `SIMPLE_MINUTE` and `SIMPLE_HOUR`, respectively.
